title: Garlicky Crumbly Ethiopian Vine Leaves Cumble
description: A raw-friendly and easy-to-make dish that combines fermented vine leaves with crispy garlic crumbles for a savory date-night treat.
instructions: Rinse the vine leaves and remove any tough stems. Slice them in half.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add cumin seeds and fry until they become fragrant.
Add sliced garlic to the pan, cook for about 1 minute until it turns golden brown.
Fold in the sliced vine leaves. Add salt as needed and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until the leaves are slightly crispy and flavorful.
Serve immediately with your favorite dips.
